title: Checkout Is Down
page: checkout is 500ing on every request. the db dashboard says postgres is up and healthy. no deploys today. it got worse right after the nightly batch window started.
hints: The app can't get a db connection - but is postgres down, or just full? Read the exact error the app is logging.
Ask postgres who is using the pool: SELECT application_name, count(*) FROM pg_stat_activity GROUP BY 1. Then find where they live and stop them.
